dialogues.dialogue: l don´t think there´s a kegger at Vasquez Lakes.  We´ve been had, Squirly.  Makes you kind of proud that we got such crafty girlfriends.  We´re lucky guys.  That´s for sure.
Just get out of there.  Can´t. We signed up.  We´re part of the few and the proud.  Part of the problem.  Come on, you guys.
dialogues.cause_raw: being part of the few and the proud

dialogues.dialogue: l miss it.  I know. I miss you.  l´m proud of you.  So I guess this is good-bye?  I guess.
How about good-bye?  You can save the world from your couch.  l´m so proud of you, Doyle.  -l´m proud of me, too. -You should be.  I love you!
You can save the world from your couch.  l´m so proud of you, Doyle.  -l´m proud of me, too. -You should be.  I love you!  We definitely learned a few things, that´s for sure.
